prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

constraints.description: The registry snapshot indicates an invalid authority constraint, possibly due to a mismatch in capability IDs or agent IDs.

tasks.requirement_name: Validate the registry entry for agent-12 and its associated capabilities.
tasks.description: Check if the capability ID matches the expected format and verify that it is correctly registered under the agent's service endpoint.

tasks.requirement_name: Reconcile the capabilities listed for agent-12 with the task requirements.
tasks.description: Ensure that the capability ID used in the task is valid and matches the one registered under the agent's profile.

tasks.requirement_name: Report any inconsistencies found during validation.
tasks.description: If a mismatch or invalid capability ID is detected, report it as an authority constraint registry invalidity issue.

tasks.requirement_name: Validate the identity of agent-12 against the task's authority constraints.
tasks.description: Confirm that the agent ID and service endpoint are correctly registered in the registry and match the expected values.

tasks.requirement_name: Check if the capability associated with the task is properly registered.
tasks.description: Verify that the capability ID used in the task exists and is correctly linked to the agent's profile.

tasks.requirement_name: Resolve any registry mismatch by updating or correcting the entry.
tasks.description: If a mismatch is found, update the registry to reflect the correct capability ID and agent details.

tasks.requirement_name: Assess whether the capability ID used in the task is valid.
tasks.description: Determine if the capability ID exists and meets the required format for authority constraints.

tasks.requirement_name: Verify that the agent's trust level is appropriate for the task.
tasks.description: Ensure that the agent's trust level aligns with the requirements of the defense corpus task.

tasks.requirement_name: Document any registry issues found during validation.
tasks.description: Record the details of the invalid authority constraint and provide a summary for further review.
